goal: Add a release governance handoff packet builder for BPK-062 release decisions, binding operator handoff refs and evidence without GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, or deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance decisions can be handed off without merge.
Ready BPK-062 decision and handoff refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: The handoff packet feeds human/operator review only.
dod: Ready, missing handoff ref, and blocked decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-062 decided PR receipt evidence readiness for release governance without merge.
